title: Telegram Crypto Exchange Without KYC
keyQuestions: Can I use a Telegram crypto exchange without KYC?
When does a Telegram crypto swap make sense?
What is the difference between bot flow and site flow?
How do I verify the real Telegram crypto bot before sending?
What should I check before a Telegram Monero swap?
When should I use the website instead of Telegram?
quickSteps: Start from the official ETZ-Swap source instead of random Telegram search results.
Verify the Telegram bot before entering any swap details.
Prepare the receiving wallet and copy the address fresh.
Review the pair, network, amount, limits, and destination address.
Send only after the details match, then save the order details and wait for the output.

issueRouting.start: Choose Telegram only when the swap route is clear, the receiving wallet is ready, and the official bot has been verified.

branches.if: The Telegram bot link came from a forwarded message, group reply, or unknown user.
then: Open ETZ-Swap from the official source.
Use the website flow if the bot identity is not fully clear.

branches.if: The receiving wallet is not ready or the address was copied from an old chat.
then: Copy the receiving address fresh and check it again.

branches.if: The source asset exists on several networks.
then: Check the source network before deposit.
Do not rely on the ticker alone.
Use the site flow if you need a larger screen for review.

branches.if: Someone messages first and offers support, recovery, or faster processing.
then: Treat the message as a possible impersonation risk.
Do not share seed phrases, private keys, screenshots of recovery data, or remote-access details.
Use only the official ETZ-Swap support route.

riskNotes: Telegram search results are not proof that a bot is official.
A copied avatar, similar handle, or familiar wording can still belong to an impersonator.
A Telegram flow does not fix a wrong receiving address or wrong network choice.
The bot should guide the swap, not take control of the user’s wallet.
For a Telegram Monero swap, wallet readiness matters before the swap begins.
Use the website flow when the pair, amount, bot identity, or receiving wallet needs slower review.
